subcodes.first_line: The effulgence of the new Lamp hath in this moment been made manifest through a new mouth, though mention thereof hath been made in the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روشنائی سراج جدید بدهن جدید در این حین تجلی نمود اگرچه ذکرش در عالم
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
